library.title: Od somo
library.subtitle: Projek mag duol kod gita mari, chakre e paro nyaka e golo.

no_results.title: Onge chenro ma yudore
no_results.description: Tem loko filta mar manyo kata mar chal.

empty.title: Od somo mari ni nono
empty.description: Chak tich manyien kowuok e chakruok, kata kelo gik ma isebedogo e disk.

project_dialog.title: Projekt manyien
project_dialog.description: Miye nying kendo iyier kaka ibiro mako weche.

album_dialog.title: Albam manyien
album_dialog.description: Grup mar chenro motudore gi albam.

album.empty: Onge chenro ma nitie e albamni nyaka sani.
album.delete_confirm_description: Projekte ok bi ruchi, mana ni ibiro golo oko mar " {{name}} ".

delete_project.confirm_description: Mae golo oko projekno kod gimoro amora ma okawo e iye. Gini ok nyal dwoko piny.

record.title: Rekod
record.subtitle: Kawo picha maler, neno rang’iny mari, kendo luwo skrip.
record.device_empty: Onge gige keto weche ma yudore.

guide.title: Seson ma otelo
guide.subtitle: We japuonj onyisi e skript okang’ ka okang’, chakre e puonjruok nyaka e weche ma iwacho.
guide.unavailable: Seson ma otelo ok yudre e sava nyaka sani.
guide.select_project_device: Yier projek kod gige keto gik moko mondo indik step chakre kae.
guide.no_record_step: Okang’ mar loso — onge rekod ma dwarore.
guide.complete_body: Ne oketo rekod mar okang’ ka okang’ mar skrip. Dwoki e tab mar Audio mar chenrono kendo iyier gik ma ihero.

best2min.hint: Otimo nonro mar teko kod ler kuom kinde duto mondo oyud dirisa mare ma nigi teko moloyo mar dakika 2 — pod inyalo loko rang’inyno gi lweti bang’e.
best2min.chart_caption: Goyo namba e dirisa ka dirisa
best2min.unavailable: Oboke maber moloyo mar dakika 2 pok yudre e sava ni nyaka sani.

record.takes_title: Okawo gik moko kowuok e seche maeni
record.takes_empty: Onge piche ma oserekod e sechegi nyaka sani.
record.ws_disconnected: Tudruok kendo gi mita mar level...
record.select_project_first: Yier tich ma ibiro chako timo.
record.select_device_first: Yier gimoro ma itiyogo e keto weche.

no_takes.title: Onge okawo nyaka sani
no_takes.description: Rekod gik manyien kata kelo fail ma osebedo.

audio.delete_take_confirm_title: Be ibiro ruch gik ma kamago?
audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Odio ma ok otigodo kod versi moro amora ma osetimre biro gol oko.

pipeline.title: Chain mar loso
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: Odwaro gimoro ma medore ma ok oketi

export.title: Kawo oro oko
export.description: Render fail mogik kowuok e versi ma osetimnegi tich.

notes.placeholder: Oboke ma onge chudo kuom chenro ni...

lyrics.placeholder: Ndik weche mag wendego kae. Ti kod palet ma ni e bath ng’atno mondo iket meta-tag mag Suno.
lyrics.versions_empty: Onge versi ma oserit nyaka sani.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Ndiko ma sani ibiro loki gi ma oserit e {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Gwel tag mondo ikete e karsa.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Ok onyis — nyalo bedo ni onge teko moro amora kuom duoko.

prompts.preview_empty: Yier template kendo ipong’ gik ma nyalo lokore mondo ine kaka ibiro neno.
prompts.char_count_warning: Sitael ma dwaro weche mokalo 1000 nyalo ng’ad gi Suno.

stems.title: Duol kod gita
stems.empty: Take ni pok opogore nyaka sani. Run pogruok mondo iwinj duol kod gita e yo mopogore opogore.
stems.capability_missing: Pogo mar gik ma owuok ok oketi e sava ni.
stems.unavailable: Pogo mar dwol kod gita pok yudre e sava ni nyaka sani.

import.title: Kelo oko
import.subtitle: Kel chenro ma osebedo e disk e od somo.

step1.title: Many folda
step1.description: Nyis folda mar root ma nigi chenro kod trak mari.
step1.path_placeholder: ranyisi E: \ Robbs \ Nyadhi \ Muzik \ Robbs
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg ok yudre — fainde ma dwaro loko ibiro weyo.

step2.title: Inyalo nono gik moko
step2.description: Rang nyinge, chal, kod gik ma ibiro kelo kapok iyie.

step3.title: Kelo oko
step3.description: <2Zepa> Siem ni ibiro kopi fainde kendo ilos chenro.
step3.copy_originals: Kopi fainde mowinjore e od somo
step3.done_description: Projek ma yudore piny kae ne olosi e od somo mari.

templates.title: Templet
templates.subtitle: Templet mag penjo ma inyalo tiyogo kendo kod meta-tag mag Suno.

editor.template_hint: Mak kama ng’ato ka ng’ato ma nyalo lokore nitie gi nyinge ma oting’o e ng’injo ariyo ma ng’injo ariyo — kaka ranyisi, ng’injo ma nigi nying’ mar “genre” bedo ng’injo ma oting’o e ng’injo ariyo mag chakruok kod ariyo mag giko.

metatags.title: Meta-tag
metatags.subtitle: Tag mag gedo kod sitael ma Suno ong'eyo ei weche mag wende.

tier_legend.4: Kidieny mar 4 — yath ma ok oting’o, ma ok onyis

metatags.empty: Onge meta-tag ma ochung’ne ng’ato nyaka sani.

settings.title: Chenro
settings.subtitle: Weche mag sistem, dhok, kod gik ma ihero.
settings.lufs_target_hint: Ne otigodo kaka paro mar chakruok sama ioro mwandu e pinje ma oko okawo. <2Zepa> Suno ochung’ machiegni gi -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Oboke mar mako rekod mar Suno
guide.subtitle: Kaka inyalo mako dwol kod gita ma kawo ma yudo duoko maberie moloyo.
guide.intro: Suno timo maber moloyo ka otiyo gi weche maler kendo ma ok ng’iyore. Oboke ni oting’o ikruok, rang’iny mar gik ma idwaro chopo, kod ndiko mar rekod ma kawo dakika 3–5.

prep.title: Iikruok
prep.body: Rekod e ot ma osetimne thieth kata ma nigi gik mang’eny mayom (katen, rug, lewni e kabat). Otur fan kod gimoro amora ma ng’ur. Inyalo ng’ado dwondi kuom dakika 5 kapok irekod.

levels.title: Okang’: -12 nyaka -6 dBFS
levels.body: <2Zepa> 12 -6 dBFS e mita. E piny mar rang’inyno, dwol ma ng’ato winjo bang’e bedo maler ahinya; e wi wachno, risk mar ng’ado yien medore. Ti kod mita ma ni e pej mar Rekod mondo iket pesa ma ibiro yudo kapok ichako.

distance.title: Bor mar mikro: sentimita 15-30
distance.body: Bed mabor gi maikrofon sentimita 15 nyaka 30. Ka ng’ato ni machiegni moloyo mano, oting’o gik ma kelo ng’anjo kod gik ma ng’ato nigo machiegni; mabor kawo reverb mang’eny mag ot kod koko.

script.title: Rekod skript
script.vowels: Weche motegno — a, e, an, o, u
script.dynamics: Gik ma timore: chak gi dwol mayom, giko matek
script.spoken_phrase: Wach achiel ma iwacho, mondo Suno onyalo somo dwol mari

expectations.title: Gima Suno geno
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, achiel, ma otuo (onge dwoko kata gik ma kelo), dakika 3 nyaka 5 mag ranyisi. Dakika 2 maler kendo ma nyiso gik ma ng’ato timo, thothne kelo duoko maberie moloyo.

suno_voice_full.name: Skript mar duol ma opong'o mar Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Dakika 5 ma otelne: puonjruok, vowel, skel, weche ariyo mag wende, ng’iyo, kod wach ma iwacho.

step.warmup_inst: Los gi ng’iyo, ng’iyo dhok (brrr), kod ng’iyo mayom kuom dakika achiel. Ok owinjore irekod — en mana mondo iwe ng’utni obed mayom kapok iwero.
step.vowels_inst: Many dwol ka dwol — a, e, i, o, u — kuom sekon 3 nyaka 4 e dwol ma iwinjo maber, ka iting’o dwol ma ok ng’ich. Mae konyo Suno mondo okaw timbre maler mar dwondi.
step.scales_inst: Wer skel mayot malo kae to piny, ka itiyo gi "la" kata "na". Ok owinjore obed malong’o chuth — gino ma idwaro timo en mapo kaka dwol mari nyalo winjore.
step.section_inst: Wer bar 8 nyaka 16 mag wendego, ka in gi gombo madier ma idwaro nyiso. Ket ler kod bedoe mokuongo moloyo bedo malong'o chuth mar teknolojia.
step.section2_inst: Wer bar mamoko 8 nyaka 16 —ma ber ka iwer korus kata sula ma opogore gi ma ne iloso motelo. Gik mathoth mopogore opogore konyo model mondo opuonjre dwondi.
step.dynamics_inst: Wer weche machalre ka ichako gi dwol mayom ahinya kendo itieko gi dwol maduong’, ma ok iketo ng’utni piny. Mano nyiso Suno kaka dwol mari nyalo bedo gi teko.
step.spoken_inst: Wuoyo — kik iwer — weche machuok kendo ma ng’ato nyalo ng’eyo, mana kaka ka utimo mbaka. Mae konyo Suno ng’eyo kaka dwolni winjore gadier.

errors.network: Ne ok nyal chopo e sava.
errors.device_busy: Gima winjore gi dwol itiyogo gi program machielo.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg ok oket — oket mondo ilok fail ni.
errors.disk_full: Ok nitie thuolo moromo mar disk.
errors.permission_denied: Ne ok oyie ne yo ma ne omiye.
errors.import_path_not_found: Yo mar kelo gik moko oko ok yudre.
errors.job_cancelled: Ne ochungi chenro mar loso gik moko.
errors.process_failed: Ne ok onyalo timo chenro mar kawo.
errors.export_failed: Ne ok nyal oro failno oko.
